# Pull Request

## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Workshop session content
- [ ] Example code
- [ ] Certificate generator
- [ ] Security or repository safety
- [ ] Maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change scoped to one topic.
- [ ] I checked that no secrets, credentials, `.env` files, private keys, real attendee data, or generated certificates are included.
- [ ] I updated relevant README files or docs.
- [ ] I tested the relevant commands, or this is a documentation-only change.
- [ ] I removed local outputs, caches, and virtual environments before committing.

## Testing Notes

<!-- List commands run, screenshots checked, or say "Docs only". -->

<!-- Anything maintainers should pay special attention to? -->
